+ "\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_capabilities_uri_normalized ON capabilities(uri_normalized COLLATE NOCASE);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_capabilities_updated_at ON capabilities(updated_at);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alternate_identities_uri_normalized ON alternate_identities(alternate_uri_normalized COLLATE NOCASE);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alternate_identities_primary_id ON alternate_identities(primary_uri_id);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_legacy_discovery_uri_normalized ON legacy_discovery_timestamps(uri_normalized COLLATE NOCASE);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversation_ids_remote_uri_normalized ON conversation_ids(remote_uri_normalized COLLATE NOCASE);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversation_ids_conversation_id ON conversation_ids(conversation_id);\n\t\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chatbot_render_information_uri ON chatbot_render_information(uri COLLATE NOCASE);\n\t"
+ "\n\t\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alternate_identities (\n\t\t\tid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n\t\t\tprimary_uri_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n\t\t\talternate_uri_normalized TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n\t\t\talternate_uri_original TEXT NOT NULL,\n\t\t\tcreated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now')),\n\t\t\tFOREIGN KEY (primary_uri_id) REFERENCES capabilities(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n\t\t)\n\t"
+ "\n\t\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS capabilities (\n\t\t\tid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n\t\t\turi_normalized TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n\t\t\turi_original TEXT NOT NULL,\n\t\t\tsupports_video_sharing INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_image_sharing INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_chat INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_file_transfer INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_geolocation INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tis_chatbot INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_feature INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tavailability_status INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_security INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\thome_kds TEXT,\n\t\t\tsupported_lazuli_extensions TEXT,\n\t\t\tlazuli_capable_timeout INTEGER,\n\t\t\tlazuli_not_capable_timeout INTEGER,\n\t\t\tupdated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now')),\n\t\t\tsupports_extended_messaging_reply INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_extended_messaging_reaction INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n\t\t\tsupports_extended_messaging_customreaction INTEGER DEFAULT 0\n\t\t)\n\t"
+ "\n\t\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chatbot_render_information (\n\t\t\tid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n\t\t\turi TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n\t\t\tjson_base64_body TEXT NOT NULL,\n\t\t\tvalidity INTEGER,\n\t\t\tetag TEXT,\n\t\t\tcreated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now'))\n\t\t)\n\t"
+ "\n\t\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conversation_ids (\n\t\t\tid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n\t\t\tremote_uri_normalized TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n\t\t\tremote_uri_original TEXT NOT NULL,\n\t\t\tconversation_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n\t\t\tcreated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now')),\n\t\t\tupdated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now'))\n\t\t)\n\t"
+ "\n\t\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legacy_discovery_timestamps (\n\t\t\tid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n\t\t\turi_normalized TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n\t\t\turi_original TEXT NOT NULL,\n\t\t\tlast_discovery_timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL,\n\t\t\tcreated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now')),\n\t\t\tupdated_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s', 'now'))\n\t\t)\n\t"
